title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at United India Insurance Capital India
jsonLd.description:
United India Insurance Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
